basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu has released the official Project Assistant Notification 2026 on 02-05-2026 at the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Jammu Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a qualification of B.Tech/BE/M.Tech in CSE/ECE/EE or relevant areas can apply online up to 10-05-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation up to 5 years is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PwD candidates as per Government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/BE/M.Tech in CSE/ECE/EE or relevant areas
qualification.details: B.Tech/BE/M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), Electrical Engineering (EE) or relevant areas.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Assistant position at IIT Jammu is 10th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech/BE/M.Tech degree in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), Electrical Engineering (EE), or a related field to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant role is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PwD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000/- per month for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position at IIT Jammu as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and need, followed by an online interview. Only eligible candidates will be considered.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIT Jammu Project Assistant application?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official website for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at IIT Jammu is a contractual role. This means the employment is for a fixed period as specified in the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Jammu located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu is located in Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir, with the pincode 182211.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Jammu and Kashmir apply?
faq.answer: The notification invites applications from eligible candidates in Jammu and Kashmir. However, it's advisable to check the official notification for specific details on domicile requirements.
